title: NadaLara Animation
description: Inclusive education-themed animation project for KMIPN 2025. Created detailed storyboards to visualize the narrative flow, and designed 2D assets including characters and environments.

title: JTK Polban '25 Merchandise
description: Designed community-oriented merchandise for student groups, including official mascot keychains for the JTK Polban '25 cohort.

title: MAN 1 Cianjur Study Tour Branding
description: Developed visual identity and tactical uniforms for a high school study tour at MAN 1 Cianjur.

title: Slain The Slime - Mini Game Team Project
description: Game MVP Assets created for a side-scroller RPG. Established distinct visual classes for the players and a scalable hierarchy for the enemies. Role: Character Designer and Lead Designer.

title: Stream Wars: Ad-venture
description: A satirical 2D clicker/arcade game where you protect an anime fan's screen from a mischievous hacker named SUPA. Developed in Godot, aimed at surviving pop-ups and literal spoilers.
